'''Rei'Kas''', sometimes known as '''Rei'Kas the Rodian''', was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Slavery/Legends|slaver]] and [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]].

==Biography==
Rei'Kas, also known as Rei'Kas the Rodian, was initially a member of the [[Jrahl Ferrin]] gang in [[Daslkehnt]]. Rei'Kas decided to leave this group after a discussion about the distribution of one bounty.<ref name="GG11" />

In [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]], Rei'Kas was a strike team leader with the [[Karazak Slavers' Cooperative/Legends|Karazak Slavers Cooperative]], and an associate of fellow Karazaks [[Avril Gresh]], [[Seland' Ir]], [[Krassis Trelix]] and [[Yanix Dev]]. Rei'Kas was described as being rough, violent and vicious and he irritated almost everyone he worked with. Notwithstanding his personal sadism, he was promoted in the Cooperative by sheer persistence and determination.<ref name="GG11" />

In [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]], Rei'Kas was an enemy of [[Crev Bombaasa/Legends|Crev Bombaasa's]] whom [[Talon Karrde]] encountered on [[Exocron]] while [[Hunt for Jorj Car'das|seeking]] [[Jorj Car'das]]. To Karrde's surprise, Rei'kas's fleet was [[Battle of Exocron|destroyed]] by the [[Aing-Tii/Legends|Aing-Tii]] Monks.<ref name="VotF" />
